actions.name: Octolock
actions.description:
Effect: On hit, the user auto-succeeds on a @Affliction[grapple] Maneuver check against the target, and target also becomes @Affliction[bound]. This @Affliction[bound] effect can be removed with a Challenging Acrobatics or Lift Skill Check taken as a Simple Action. While the target is @Affliction[bound], they lose -1 DEF and SPDEF Stages for 5 Activations at the end of each of their Activations.

If the user loses either @Affliction[grapple] or @Affliction[bound], the target loses the other condition.
